data.title: Genesis AI Hires Former Amazon Leader Vivian Sun to Advance Commercialization
data.description: Genesis AI has appointed Sun as their Vice President of Commercial and Strategy to spearhead the company's commercialization strategy and global partnerships, as they move into the next phase of growth. The announcement was made in Paris and San Carlos on April 10, 2026. Genesis AI, a prominent full-stack robotics company, aims to leverage Sun's expertise to drive expansion and solidify their position in the market.

data.title: OCI Global Sells Shares of Methanex Corporation
data.description: OCI Global, listed on Euronext under OCI, revealed on April 10, 2026, the sale of 2 million common shares of Methanex Corporation through its subsidiary OCI Chemicals B.V. This amounts to about 2.6% of Methanex's total shares.

data.title: Uxin Reports Unaudited Financial Results for the Quarter and Full Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Uxin Limited, a prominent used car retailer in China listed on Nasdaq under the ticker UXIN, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter and fiscal year concluding December 31, 2025. This announcement was made by the Company on April 10, 2026, in Beijing. The specific figures for revenue, earnings, and other financial metrics were detailed in the release. The Company's representatives addressed shareholders in a statement regarding these results, expressing gratitude and highlighting key points from the financial report.

data.title: Ceva Animal Health appoints Sébastien Huron as Deputy Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In the town of Libourne, France, on April 10, 2026, Ceva Animal Health, the global animal health company ranking as the fifth largest in the world, has revealed the appointment of Sébastien Huron as the new Deputy Chief Executive Officer. The company is primarily owned by its management team and this leadership change is effective immediately. The decision to bring in Huron is a strategic move that aligns with the company's objectives for growth and development in the animal health sector.
